description: Permit.io provides authorization infrastructure for applications and APIs, including policy management, permission checks, access requests, and related tooling. It also offers MCP-focused products for controlling and auditing access to AI-agent tool usage.
summary: Permit.io exposes a REST API at `https://api.permit.io/v2`, an npm-distributed `permit` CLI, and a documented Permit MCP Server; all documented developer surfaces require Permit-issued credentials, primarily API keys or CLI login.
